etymology.description: semantic 扌(扌, "hand") + phonetic 員(員, "a member; employee") -> damage or decrease related to actions involving hands
etymology.interpretation: The character 損 (sǔn, "decrease; damage") combines 扌(扌, "hand"), representing action or manipulation, with 員(員, "a member; employee") to suggest the act of diminishing or causing harm, typically through manual actions or handling.
etymology.simplification: Simplified from 損 by replacing 員(員) (yuán, "a member") with its simplified form 员(員).

examples.chinese: 天气寒冷会损坏老人的健康(天氣寒冷會損壞老人的健康)。
examples.pinyin: Tiānqì hánlěng huì sǔnhuài lǎorén de jiànkāng.
examples.english: Cold weather can damage the health of the elderly.

examples.chinese: 过度的开发会严重损害自然环境(過度的開發會嚴重損害自然環境)。
examples.pinyin: Guòdù de kāifā huì yánzhòng sǔnhài zìrán huánjìng.
examples.english: Excessive development can seriously damage the natural environment.

examples.chinese: 长时间使用电子设备可能会损伤视力(長時間使用電子設備可能會損傷視力)。
examples.pinyin: Cháng shíjiān shǐyòng diànzǐ shèbèi kěnéng huì sǔnshāng shìlì.
examples.english: Prolonged use of electronic devices may damage vision.
